title: Two Soccer Kicks
body: Two soccer players simultaneously kick a stationary ball of mass $$0.420$$ kg on a flat field. The first player kicks with a force of $$162$$ N at $$9.0$$ degrees north of west. At the same instant, the second player kicks with a force of $$215$$ N at $$15$$ degrees east of south. Let $$\hat{i}$$ point east and $$\hat{j}$$ point north.
